title: Blood or Urine Calcium Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y3nfyme

steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for Calcium analysis by running a multi analyte standard and two assayed control serum.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 5µL of sample into a cuvette slot. b) Add 180 µL of Calcium Liquid Reagent. c) Mixture is incubated at 37˚C and spun for 10 minutes. d) Absorbance is measured at 650nm.

substeps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus.
Pipette 5µL of sample into a cuvette slot.
Add 180 µL of Calcium Liquid Reagent.
Mixture is incubated at 37˚C and spun for 10 minutes.
